project: The System — Personal Gamification Command Center

pages.Index.tsx: Main dashboard — player profile, stats, system intelligence, quests snapshot
pages.Quests.tsx: Quest management — protocol quests, pillar quests, shadow quests, AI quests, time blocks
pages.Training.tsx: Workout tracker — exercise logging, RPE, rest timer, mesocycle, fatigue, readiness
pages.Progress.tsx: Analytics — history, AAR, weekly summaries, behavioral patterns, shadow intel, loops
pages.Store.tsx: Item shop — spend currency on boosts, consumables, cosmetics
pages.More.tsx: Overflow menu — settings, shadow army, dungeons, inventory, focus mode
pages.SystemAnalytics.tsx: Deep system analytics and trajectory forecasting

contexts.AuthContext.tsx: Supabase auth session management, user state
contexts.JarvisBrainContext.tsx: Unified JARVIS intelligence — user learning, shadow intel, synthesis, anticipation, proactive messaging
contexts.DayCycleContext.tsx: Day/night cycle engine — time-based UI and quest theming
contexts.FocusModeContext.tsx: Focus mode state — distraction-free overlay toggle
contexts.SystemCommsContext.tsx: System-wide communication banner and notification dispatch

intelligence.useUserLearning.ts: Behavioral pattern analysis — peak hours, avoidance patterns, energy mapping, streak analysis, goal patterns
intelligence.useJarvisSynthesis.ts: Connects shadow findings to user patterns — generates synthesized insights with priority ranking
intelligence.useJarvisAnticipation.ts: Predictive engine — anticipates peak windows, crash hours, deadlines, and surfaces preparation alerts
intelligence.useSystemIntelligenceAI.ts: AI-powered system intelligence via edge function
intelligence.useSystemInterventions.ts: Automated intervention triggers based on player state
intelligence.useSystemChat.ts: JARVIS chat interface with AI-powered responses

player.usePlayer.ts: Player state management — level, XP, stats, streaks
player.useDailyXP.ts: Daily XP tracking and cap management
player.useCaffeine.ts: Caffeine intake tracking and energy correlation

quests.useProtocolQuests.ts: Daily protocol quest generation and completion
quests.usePillarQuests.ts: Life pillar quest system (health, wealth, relationships, growth)
quests.useShadowQuest.ts: Shadow quest generation from defeated content
quests.useAIQuests.ts: AI-generated adaptive quests via edge function
quests.useEmergencyQuests.ts: Emergency quest triggers for critical situations

shadows.useShadowArmy.ts: Shadow army management — extraction, evolution, research agents, findings, templates
shadows.useLootDrops.ts: Loot drop system on quest completion

training.useSprintTimer.ts: Sprint/focus timer for timed work blocks

systems.usePenaltyDungeon.ts: Penalty dungeon triggers for missed commitments

dashboard.TopBar.tsx: App header with notifications and settings
dashboard.PlayerProfile.tsx: Player avatar, level, title, XP bar
dashboard.StatusWindow.tsx: Solo Leveling-style status window with stats
dashboard.SystemIntelligencePanel.tsx: AI-powered intelligence dashboard with predictions and challenges

quests.ProtocolQuestCard.tsx: Daily protocol quest with completion tracking
quests.SprintOverlay.tsx: Sprint timer overlay during focused work

shadows.ShadowIntelPanel.tsx: Shadow research findings viewer — read/act/dismiss intel from autonomous research agents

jarvis.JarvisPageBanner.tsx: Context-aware JARVIS intelligence banner — proactive messages with anticipation, insights, shadow intel, and pattern nudges

aar.AARModal.tsx: After Action Review modal with AI analysis

store.StoreItemCard.tsx: Store item with rarity and purchase

types.learning.ts: UserLearning — execution patterns, avoidance patterns, energy mapping, streaks, goals, response patterns, derived insights
types.playerState.ts: Extended player state with penalties and modifiers
types.shadowArmy.ts: Shadow types with research config, findings, sources, and evolution
types.training.ts: Training session, exercise, and workout types

utils.aiModelRouter.ts: Routes AI requests to optimal model based on task
utils.lootEngine.ts: Loot drop calculation and rarity engine

data.lootTable.ts: Loot drop tables with rarity weights
data.shadowTemplates.ts: 6 shadow research agent templates — Business Mentor, Automation Scout, Industry Watcher, Cold Outreach Intel, Fitness Optimizer, Content Trends
data.storeItems.ts: Store item catalog with prices and effects

edgeFunctions.ai-quest-proxy: AI quest generation proxy — routes to Lovable AI gateway
edgeFunctions.generate-aar: After Action Review generation via AI analysis
edgeFunctions.shadow-research: Autonomous shadow research agent — analyzes sources via Lovable AI and returns structured findings with relevance scoring
edgeFunctions.system-chat: JARVIS chat AI responses with full player context
edgeFunctions.web-intel: Dual-model intelligence gathering — Groq (fast scan/brief) + Gemini (deep research/scout) with cross-validation

tables.profiles: User profiles — display name, title, goal
tables.player_state: Player stats — level, XP, streak, stats JSON, penalties
tables.quest_history: Completed quest log with XP and categories
tables.shadow_army: Shadow soldiers — name, category, power, status, metadata
tables.training_log: Training session log — exercises, volume, fatigue, genetic phase
tables.dungeons: Dungeon instances — objectives, rewards, time limits

functions.has_role: Security definer function for role checks

userLearning.description: Behavioral pattern analysis engine that learns from quest history

shadowResearch.description: Autonomous research agents that monitor external sources
capabilities: Source monitoring — Twitter, YouTube, Reddit, websites
Content analysis via AI — relevance and actionability scoring
Finding synthesis — connects findings to user goals

synthesis.description: Connects shadow research findings to user behavioral patterns
capabilities: Linking business intel to revenue goals

anticipation.description: Predictive engine that surfaces information before user needs it

proactiveMessaging.description: Unified message generation from all intelligence sources

gamificationSystems.xp: Experience points with daily caps and level progression
gamificationSystems.streaks: Daily streak tracking with cold streak penalties
gamificationSystems.loot: RNG loot drops on quest completion with rarity tiers
gamificationSystems.shadows: Solo Leveling-inspired shadow army — extract, evolve, deploy as research agents
gamificationSystems.dungeons: Timed challenge dungeons with objectives and XP rewards
gamificationSystems.store: Item shop for boosts, consumables, and cosmetics
gamificationSystems.cornerstones: Core habit tracking with streak protection
gamificationSystems.emergencyQuests: High-stakes emergency quests for critical situations
